monitor_the_situation.title: Israeli Forces Kill Child in Qalandia Camp, West Bank
— S3 · Conflict · Qalandia Camp, West Bank, Palestine · 2h ago. Israeli forces killed a child named Walid on the roof of his home in Qalandia refugee camp north of Jerusalem.
Baby Dies in West Bank After Israeli Forces Block Medical Care
— S3 · Conflict · West Bank, Palestine · 5h ago. A Palestinian infant died in the occupied West Bank after Israeli forces obstructed access to emergency medical care.
